title: Ansercula.
content:
Goosey goosey gander,
	    Where shall you wander?
	    Up stairs, down stairs,
	    In my lady�s chamber.

	        Ansercula vagula, blandula,
	        Qu� nunc abibis in loca?
	        Sursum, deorsum,
	        In domin� cubiculum.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jacob Bigelow, titled "Ansercula.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
